title: Esbit Camping Cook Set for 4 People — 10-Piece, Aluminum
short_description: Complete 10-piece camping cook set made of lightweight aluminum. Pots, pan, plates, cups — everything included for 4 people.
long_description: The Esbit cook set includes everything needed for outdoor cooking: two pots, one pan, four plates, four cups, and handy utensils. The lightweight aluminum heats quickly and evenly, while the foldable handles save space in your backpack. All pieces nest together for compact storage.
buying_angle: Ideal for campers who value practical features in their kitchen gear: 10-piece set, for 4 people, lightweight aluminum.
